property_description: Bayshore Corporate Center is located at 1650 to 1730 South Amphlett Blvd in San Mateo, California. This 340,214 sf, 8 building park is centrally located on the Peninsula between San Francisco and Palo Alto. The property is located adjacent of major Highways 101 and 92 and provides easy access to the San Mateo Bridge. This premier location allows tenants the ability to commute from San Francisco to the north, San Jose to the south, or the east bay cities, all in less than half an hour's time. Bayshore Corporate Center has a wide variety of amenities including an abundance of parking, elevators running to all floors, HVAC through each building, as well having an on-site fitness facility, food/beverage restaurants and outdoor sheltered seating.
space_description: Open office space. Centrally located in the Peninsula with direct access to Highway 101, Highway 92 and the San Mateo Bridge. Close proximity to the Post Office, a wide variety of shopping centers, fitness facilities and grocery stores, including Trader Joe's just seconds away. On-site gym, cafe, dry cleaners and Starbucks. Located on the Caltrain Corridor for easy commuting access. Outdoor benches and seating areas throughout the property. Within a 30 minutes drive to the Bay Area's 3 main airports; San Francisco International, Oakland International and San Jose International. Free on-site parking with a high profile professional setting. On-site leasing and property management office. Five minutes to downtown San Mateo and the El Camino Real.

The property is located adjacent of major Highways 101 and 92 and provides easy access to the San Mateo Bridge. This premier location allows tenants the ability to commute from San Francisco to the north, San Jose to the south, or the east bay cities, all in less than half an hour's time. Bayshore Corporate Center has a wide variety of amenities including an abundance of parking, elevators running to all floors, HVAC through each building, as well having an on-site fitness facility, food/beverage restaurants and outdoor sheltered seating.
space_description: Reception, 4 private offices and conference room. Centrally located in the Peninsula with direct access to Highway 101, Highway 92 and the San Mateo Bridge. Close proximity to the Post Office, a wide variety of shopping centers, fitness facilities and grocery stores, including Trader Joe's just seconds away. On-site gym, cafe, dry cleaners and Starbucks. Located on the Caltrain Corridor for easy commuting access. Outdoor benches and seating areas throughout the property. Within a 30 minutes drive to the Bay Area's 3 main airports; San Francisco International, Oakland International and San Jose International. Free on-site parking with a high profile professional setting. On-site leasing and property management office. Five minutes to downtown San Mateo and the El Camino Real.

property_description: Westpark Business Campus is an seven building park in the heart of Tysons Corner totaling 751,279 square feet. It is ideally located at the intersection of I-495 and the Dulles Toll Road (Rt. 267). This prime location provides direct access to downtown Washington, Maryland suburbs and all of Northern Virginia making it a first choice for companies serving a regional client base. Westpark Business Campus is also strategically located adjacent to the ongoing HOT Lanes roadway expansion (2012 completion) and future Silver Line Metro stations (Phase I complete in 2013). Tysons Corner is nationally recognized as a retail hub with two regional malls and numerous local amenities including restaurants, fitness facilities, and entertainment centers. Westpark Business Campus offers flexible floor plate sizes from 900 square feet to 22,082 square feet. These versatile floor plates cater to a variety of tenants and are perfectly dimensioned to accommodate small users and large organizations alike.
space_description: 1521 Westbranch Drive. Business storage space from 166-372 SF, for a convenient alternative for storing non-essential furniture and computer equipment or additional business items. Excellent proximity to Tysons Corner Mall and Tysons Galleria with many nearby retailers and restaurants. Easy access to the Jones Branch Drive and Westpark Drive entrances to the 495 Express Lanes allow easier and faster driving options for Tysons commuters. 3/4 mile to Tysons Central 123 Metrorail station. Westpark Executive Club with three conference rooms and fitness facility available to all customers on a first-come first-served basis. Three on-site delicatessens including Subway Cafe. Nearby hotels include the McLean Hilton and Ritz Carlton. Responsive ownership and on-site management. Flexibility in suite sizes and lease terms. Strategically located in Tysons Corner with easy access to I-495, Route 7, Route 123, and Dulles Toll Road.

property_description: Tysons Corporate Center consists of approximately 270,000 square feet in two eight-story Class B office buildings in the heart of Tysons Corner. Located fronting Boone Boulevard, this property is tucked in between Leesburg Pike (Route 7) and Chain Bridge Road (Route 123). These two thoroughfares are the major transportation spines of Tysons Corner. In addition, TCC will be less than 1/2 mile from the new Tysons Central 7 Metrorail Station (Silver Line) located on Route 7 just northwest of Route 123. Both buildings feature newly renovated common areas, including hallways, ADA restrooms, first-class lobbies, and elevators. The flexible floor plans and the superior location make Tysons Corporate Center a first choice for large and small businesses.
